description.value: APPEARANCE FUNCTION Aura moderate transmutation; CL 7th; Slot shoulders; Price 10,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. APPEARANCE This ruffled silk cloak is incredibly durable despite its soft, delicate construction. FUNCTION Anytime the wearer falls asleep (whether the sleep is natural or brought on by a magical effect), the cloak immediately transforms into sticky strands that envelop the wearerâs body, hardening into a solid silk cocoon. While wrapped in the cocoon the wearer gains a +4 enhancement bonus to natural armor and is protected from critical hits and sneak attacks as if subject to the light fortification armor ability (25% chance for normal damage on a critical hit ). The cocoon opens and transforms back into a cloak once the wearer awakens. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, vermin shape I; Cost 5,000 gp.
